evidence_summary: Current official Axsome pages describe Axsome as an independent biopharmaceutical company, and current official Takeda news/partnership pages do not show Axsome as an acquired company, merger partner, or subsidiary. Search results also did not surface any official Axsome-Takeda acquisition, merger, or parent-subsidiary announcement. At most, any apparent connection is indirect or absent, so the relationship should be classified as None/Unclear.
